surface.name: Launch hellofly demo app with flyctl
surface.selection_basis: Official Launch a demo app guide is the hosted first-app path: install flyctl, fly auth signup, fly launch --image flyio/hellofly:latest, then fly apps open. Credit card is prompted for new Pay As You Go accounts.

alternatives_considered.name: fly launch from local source
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Requires existing project source; demo image is the documented first-app walkthrough.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Fly.io account, launch the hellofly demo image, and open the fly.dev URL.
assumed_prior_state: No Fly.io account or app exists.

documented_first_success.official_milestone: You've successfully launched your first app on Fly.io!
documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: hellofly demo is deployed and https://<app>.fly.dev/ loads via fly apps open.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: fly status shows the app; fly apps open loads the demo over HTTPS.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Launch a demo app ends Visit your app with You've successfully launched your first app on Fly.io!

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: Named first-app success after deploy and browser visit.

prerequisites.requirement: Fly.io account via fly auth signup/login.
Credit card for new Pay As You Go accounts when prompted.

primary_path.action: Install flyctl for the local OS.
Run fly auth signup (or fly auth login) and complete browser signup, including payment details when prompted.
primary_path.success_signal: CLI returns to a logged-in shell.

primary_path.action: Run fly launch --image flyio/hellofly:latest and accept defaults to deploy.
primary_path.success_signal: Deploy finishes with Visit your newly deployed app URL.

primary_path.action: Run fly status and fly apps open to confirm the HTTPS demo.
primary_path.success_signal: Browser loads the hellofly app at *.fly.dev.

friction_gates.description: New accounts are prompted for credit card on Pay As You Go.
